text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The exact title "Biotalk: Enzyme function prediction with natural language supervision" was not found in any academic database or via web search. The arXiv ID 2404.02285 points to an unrelated paper ("LP++: A Surprisingly Strong Linear Probe for Few-Shot CLIP"), and no dedicated paper page with this exact title and the cited authors (Hoarfrost, Smith, Xu, Wang) could be located. A GitHub project called "biotalk" (hoarfrost-lab/biotalk) exists for a related dataset paper, but its actual title and authors differ from the cited reference.
LINK: NONE
